items.title: Maryland Department of Aging
items.description: LGBTQIA+ elder resources, aging support, caregiver information, and inclusive services for older adults in Maryland.

items.title: SAGE
items.description: Offers advocacy, support services, and resources for LGBTQIA+ elders, with virtual programs, local connections, and aging support nationwide.

items.title: Governor’s Resources for Impacted Federal Workers
items.description: For workers impacted by recent federal actions, including unemployment, health coverage, housing, legal help, and job support.

items.title: Resources for Workers Impacted by the Federal Government Transition
items.description: For former federal workers, including unemployment benefits, job search support, workshops, loan programs, and career guidance.

items.title: Chase Brexton
items.description: Offers primary care, dental, mental health, sexual health, and support services at five Maryland locations.

items.title: Maryland Department of Health: LGBTQ+ Health
items.description: Find free or affordable LGBTQ+ health services in Maryland, including family planning clinics, care resources, and local support organizations.

items.title: Planned Parenthood of Maryland
items.description: Planned Parenthood of Maryland provides abortion, birth control, telehealth, STI testing, and reproductive health care at centers across Maryland.

items.title: Whitman-Walker Health
items.description: Offers inclusive primary care, dental, mental health, HIV/STI services, and legal support.

items.title: Women’s Health Center of Maryland
items.description: Offers abortion care, STI testing, contraception, annual exams, and gender-affirming hormone therapy.

items.title: The Trevor Project
items.description: Resources for LGBTQ+ young people and allies, including mental health guides, coming out support, and identity resources.

items.title: The 988 Lifeline
items.description: Call, text, or chat 988 for free, confidential mental health and crisis support 24/7, including help for emotional distress or substance use.

items.title: SAGE x HearMe
items.description: Offers virtual support for LGBTQ+ older adults, including online events, resources, community connection, and financial wellness tools.

items.title: Trans Lifeline
items.description: Trans-led nonprofit offering peer support, crisis resources, and community tools to help trans people survive and thrive.

items.title: Maryland Safe Haven (Baltimore Safe Haven)
items.description: Provides housing support, harm reduction, HIV testing, legal help, and wellness services for LGBTQIA+ people in Maryland.

items.title: Auntie’s Home
items.description: Provides transitional housing, community resources, and support for transgender, gender-diverse, and nonbinary people in Maryland.

items.title: Baltimore Mayor’s Office of LGBTQ Affairs
Advocates for Trans Equality (A4TE)
items.description: A trans-led nonprofit advancing legal, political, and social equality for transgender people.

items.title: Gender Affirming Letter Access Project
items.description: Resources for gender-affirming care, including provider directories, referral letter guidance, FAQs, and support for adults seeking letters.

items.title: Transition Related Care - Trans Health Equity Act (THEA)
items.description: Learn about Maryland Medicaid coverage for gender-affirming care, including eligible services, prior authorization, and provider billing guidance.

items.title: interACT: Advocates for Intersex Youth
items.description: Advocates for intersex youth through law, policy, education, media, and resources that support bodily autonomy and human rights.

items.title: TIGERRS - Intersex Resources
items.description: Intersex resources, peer support, media, and advocacy links for people who are intersex, questioning, or looking for community support.

items.title: Strategy Lab for Intersex Movements (SLIM)
items.description: Builds intersex power through research, media, community events, and organizing for bodily autonomy and change.

items.title: Outright International: Global Intersex Program
items.description: Advances intersex rights through advocacy, education, research, and global movement building.

items.title: Maryland Department of Veterans and Military Families
items.description: Find LGBTQIA+ veteran support in Maryland, including benefits, legal help, crisis resources, discharge upgrades, and community services.

items.title: Modern Military Association of America
items.description: Advocacy organization for LGBTQ+ service members, veterans, families, and policy change.

items.title: Transgender American Veterans Association (TAVA)
items.description: Nonprofit supporting trans veterans through advocacy, membership, and community.

items.title: Minority Veterans of America
items.description: Nonprofit building community, advancing equity, and providing advocacy, housing, and support programs.

items.title: SPARTA
items.description: Nonprofit supporting transgender service members and veterans through advocacy, education, peer support, and grants.

items.title: American Veterans for Equal Rights (AVER)
items.description: National organization supporting LGBTQ+ veterans through advocacy, community, chapters, and resources.

items.title: Military Trans Rights
items.description: Learn about military trans rights, including policy updates, legal resources, advocacy tools, and support for transgender service members.

items.title: Guidance on LGBTQIA+ protections under Maryland law
items.description: Know your rights in Maryland on housing, work, schools, health care, LGBTQIA+ protections, hate crimes, and how to file a complaint.

items.title: Find LGBTQIA+ services and rights organizations
items.description: Information on legal rights, assistance programs, and key services available to LGBTQAI+ communities in Maryland.

items.title: Know Your Rights: Passports
items.description: Know your rights on U.S. passports, including sex marker rules, name changes, travel tips, and what to do if you face application issues.

items.title: Trans Legal Survival Guide
items.description: Information to help the trans community navigate changing regulations and advocate for themselves and their networks.

items.title: Identity Documents for Transgender People: Current Considerations
items.description: Get current guidance on updating identity documents for transgender people, including passports, birth certificates, REAL IDs, and travel concerns.

items.title: File a complaint with the Maryland Commission on Civil Rights
items.description: Learn about the Maryland Commission on Civil Rights intake process, what to expect when filing a complaint, and how discrimination reports are reviewed.

items.title: Report a hate crime incident with the Office of the Attorney General
items.description: Report hate crimes and bias incidents in Maryland, learn the difference, find resources, and access support from the Office of the Attorney General.

items.title: FreeState Justice
items.description: Provides free legal services, policy advocacy, training, and resources to support LGBTQ+ people across Maryland.

items.title: GLAD Law
items.description: Fights for LGBTQ+ rights and justice through legal advocacy, policy work, and free resources for people facing discrimination.

items.title: Lambda Legal
items.description: Resources for LGBTQ+ people and people living with HIV, including legal guides, FAQs, and help desk support.

items.title: Maryland Legal Aid
items.description: Provides free civil legal services, clinics, and legal help for eligible Marylanders facing housing, family, and other issues.

items.title: GLISTEN
items.description: A national nonprofit advancing justice for LGBTQ+ youth and creating safer, more affirming K-12 schools.

items.title: The Trevor Project
items.description: Find LGBTQIA+ youth resources, including mental health support, coming out guides, gender identity information, and allyship tools.

items.title: University of Maryland, College Park: LGBTQ+ Equity Center
items.description: Find programs, events, and resources that support an inclusive campus community.

items.title: University of Maryland, Baltimore County: The Pride Center for LGBTQIA2+ Diversity
items.description: Find community, events, leadership opportunities, and campus support resources.

items.title: File an Appeal with the State Board
items.description: Learn how to appeal a local board of education decision in Maryland, including filing deadlines, procedures, and State Board requirements.

items.title: Safe and Supportive Schools for All Students
items.description: Guidance for Maryland schools on creating safe spaces for LGBTQIA+ youth, including bullying prevention, mental health support, and inclusive practices.

items.title: Bullying Prevention and Reporting Form
items.description: Find Maryland bullying prevention resources, reporting forms, and school guidance on harassment, intimidation, and cyberbullying.

items.title: Title IX: Applicable Guidance and Compliance
items.description: Learn about Title IX in Maryland, including discrimination protections, complaint filing options, coordinator contacts, and compliance guidance.

items.title: Nondiscrimination in Education Procedure and Process for Filing Complaints
items.description: Learn about Maryland's nondiscrimination in education procedure, including protected classes, complaint filing steps, deadlines, mediation, and appeals.

items.title: Calendar of LGBTQIA+ Observances and Pride Celebrations
items.description: Explore LGBTQIA+ observances and Pride celebrations across Maryland with key dates, events, and community opportunities to celebrate and connect.
